race.comment: CAPTAIN EAGLE (1) looks close to a win and should take beating. This easier than last start and did win only try course and distance. Will go forward and should be hard to catch. O'CALDINO (2) was safely held last time but will find this easier. Wide draw but well worth another chance. SLY CORNER (3) was well beaten on the poly track on the Sunny Coast last time. Best form is one turn and went close the start prior. Can bounce back. KENSHIN MARU (8) wasn't far from the winner last time. Goes well here and can improve without surprising. LIKEABEEL (4) is a veteran galloper with good figures for this level and can improve sharply on recent runs.
